title: ENGLISH AS A SECOND LANGUAGE - 211info
text: FRIENDS OF REFUGEES ENGLISH AS A SECOND LANGUAGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides English as Second Language (ESL) classes. Childcare and transportation are available depending on distance and current staffing levels. Eligibility: Age 18 and older refugees and asylum-seekers, all others can inquire about availability on a case by case basis Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9:30am-11:30am Email (503) 858-4042 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (503) 858-4042 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: $40 registration and materials fee each year DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Arabic, Dari, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Aloha, Beaverton, and Tigard Services: English as a Second Language If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
